rules: A worker worktree is denied unless free space is at least 25 GiB before admission and remains at least 20 GiB after the conservative projected write.
Local source edits and deterministic tests are denied if their projected write exceeds 512 MiB or would leave less than 5 GiB free.
Docker starts, model downloads, runtime artifact materialization, and dataset materialization are forbidden locally while RunPod is the sole production runtime and storage platform.
This policy grants no deletion, Docker, model, runtime, coordinator, product, or promotion authority.
